files.patch:
@@ -7364,4 +7364,3 @@ - For the class indicated by klass, return the access - flags - via modifiers_ptr. - Access flags are defined in . + For the class indicated by klass, return the Java language + modifiers and class/interface properties of the corresponding + java.lang.Class object, via modifiers_ptr. @@ -7369,2 +7368,15 @@ - If the class is an array class, then its public, private, and protected - modifiers are the same as those of its component type. For arrays of + The modifiers are encoded as a mask of access-flag bit values defined in + . The returned value is not necessarily the value of the + access_flags item in the class file of klass. + In particular, for member, local, or anonymous classes and interfaces, the result + may include modifiers represented by access flags from the InnerClasses + attribute, such as ACC_STATIC. +

+ The modifiers include, as applicable, the Java Virtual Machine constants for + public, private, protected, final, static, abstract, and interface, as well as + access-flag bit values for other class/interface properties encoded in the + result of invoking java.lang.Class.getModifiers() on the + corresponding java.lang.Class object. +

+ If klass is an array class, then its public, private, and + protected modifiers are the same as those of its component type. For arrays of @@ -7372,1 +7384,2 @@ - classes (for example, java.lang.Integer.TYPE). + classes, such as java.lang.Integer.TYPE. For array classes, the + abstract and final modifiers are set, and the interface modifier is not set. @@ -7374,2 +7387,3 @@ - If the class is a primitive class, its public modifier is always true, - and its protected and private modifiers are always false. + If klass is a primitive type or void, then its public, abstract, + and final modifiers are always set, and its protected, private, and interface + modifiers are never set. @@ -7377,4 +7391,6 @@ - If the class is an array class or a primitive class then its final - modifier is always true and its interface modifier is always false. - The values of its other modifiers are not determined by this specification. - + When preview features are enabled, the ACC_IDENTITY access flag + is set if and only if klass is an identity class or an array class. +

+ When preview features are disabled, the ACC_SUPER access flag may be + set only if klass is not a primitive type or void. The flag has no + effective meaning. @@ -7395,1 +7411,1 @@ - On return, points to the current access flags of this class. + On return, points to the modifiers of this class.

@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@

+/**
+ * Defines a method to invoke JVMTI GetClassModifiers.
+ */
+
+class GetClassModifiers {
+    private GetClassModifiers() {}
+
+    private static native void init();
+
+    static native int getClassModifiers(Class<?> clazz);
+
+    static {
+        System.loadLibrary("GetClassModifiers");
+        init();
+    }
+}
